claims.summary: The heartbeat follow-up should expose bounded pressure context.
claims.disposition: Verified the review now reports pressure mean, range, variance, and sample count from the captured mechanical context.

claims.summary: The heartbeat follow-up should expose bounded entropy context.
claims.disposition: Verified the review reports entropy mean, range, variance, and sample count without treating them as felt state.

claims.summary: Within-enqueue pressure change or Shadow dispersal may help distinguish admission from handoff friction.
claims.disposition: Route a preregistered capture that measures pre/post enqueue mechanical context under one process/deployment identity without changing heartbeat behavior.

claims.summary: A Transition_Viscosity or pressure score should stand in for how the pulse was lived.
claims.disposition: Verified the epistemic linter rejects felt scoring and numeric-to-felt inference; preserve Astrid's explicit qualitative review as the only felt-result source.
